samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit input operand B.</input>
        <input id="cin">Carry-in input.</input>
        <output id="sum" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit sum output.</output>
        <output id="cout">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
    <para>Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic.</para>
    <para>Use a single assign statement to perform the addition.</para>
    </implementation>
</module>
